purpose: Run bounded health checks at startup, low-priority background time, or before high-impact actions.

rules.startup: Missing core routing or policy files blocks the run.
rules.background: A failed non-critical check marks capability degraded and never changes production data.
rules.pre_l4: Missing scope, source freshness, evidence, or workflow references blocks high-impact execution.
rules.normal_chat: Health checks are not loaded for L0/L1 direct answers or continuation shortcuts.

invariants: Health checks are read-only and do not start a scheduler, network call, or external Agent.
A failed check lowers capability or blocks the next phase; it cannot be hidden by a summary.
Checks report the failing location and recovery hint.
A background check must not mutate the task or business source.
